calendar.matters:
Petition Of Beneficiary For Order Appointing Successor Trustees Probate Code 15643 D 15660 D And 17200
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Malone for (petitioner) Jill Hickman.

The Court asked counsel why venue is proper in San Francisco. Mr. Malone cited 17005 and that this court has already dealt with the internal affairs of this trust. The Court pointed out that this is a living trust not a testamentary trust. Mr. Malone stated that there are stocks that are with Morgan Stanley in Palo Alto however nothing is actually there, that there financial records, tax records and files in San Francisco (at Mr. Bell's office, 220 Montgomery Street, Suite 810) and that he himself is in San Francisco. The Court stated that assuming we get past venue it has no problem appointing Mr. Myers and that as far as addressing further vacancies we would need an amendment to the petition. Mr. Malone stated that it was not essential, that he was just trying to save money for his clients but that it is urgent to get Mr. Myers appointed as they currently have no access to funds and are unable to pay the beneficiaries. The petition of beneficiary for order appointing successor trustees was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts . (Not Reported)
